Description: either productivity, social networking, or games.
the app name as identified by Apple’s App Store.
a unique ID assigned to each review.
a unique ID assigned to each sentence in the review.
the title of the review as shown in the reviews page of Apple’s App Store.
the main text to classify (part of the complete review).
the rating stars of the review as shown in the reviews page of Apple’s App Store.
a Boolean value indicating whether the sentence express a positive/negative opinion.
one of the pre-defined set of domain-specific categories that represent an aspect of the app (e.g., security, usability, etc.).
a term that exists in the sentence and describes an aspect of an app that is expressed by the sentiment. A term value of “N/A” means that the term is not explicitly mentioned in the sentence.
the start index of the aspect term.
the ending index of the aspect term.
